graphql.query:
query workspace($workspaceId: String!) {
  workspace(workspaceId: $workspaceId) {
    __typename
    avatar
    banReason
    createdAt
    # customer
    discordRole
    id
    name
    preferredRegion
    # referredUsers
    slackChannelId
    subscriptionModel
    supportTierOverride
    # team
  }
}
